sections.title: Meeting Context
content: Prep pack provides a structured framework for the discussion.

sections.title: Pre-Call Research Notes
fallback: Pre-call research on {expert_name} and {topic_area}. Check LinkedIn, institutional websites, and recent publications before the call.
sections.prompt_addendum: Write 3-4 sentences of pre-call research notes for a KOL meeting. Suggest what to look up about the expert and the topic area.

subsections.title: Clinical Landscape
questions: What is your assessment of the current disease landscape?
What are the major unmet medical needs?
How is the standard of care evolving?

subsections.title: Competitive Dynamics
questions: What emerging therapies concern you most?
What is your view on the clinical trial landscape?

subsections.title: Commercial Outlook
questions: What are the key market access barriers?
What drives adoption curves in your view?

subsections.title: Regulatory Environment
questions: What are approval timelines likely to be?
What policy changes would impact your field?

sections.title: Key Hypotheses to Test
sections.prompt_addendum: Write 4-5 investment hypotheses to test with this KOL. Each should be a short statement that the expert can validate or refute. Format as numbered statements.
